info.name: Feedback Module API
info.description: Complete API collection for the Feedback Module with smiley-based rating system

request.description: Create a feedback form for a session. Only admins can create feedback forms.
Get feedback form for a session. Available to session participants and admins.
Submit feedback responses. Available rating values: VERY_POOR, POOR, AVERAGE, GOOD, EXCELLENT
Get feedback results and analytics. Only admins can view results.
Update feedback form properties. Only admins can update feedback forms.
Delete feedback form and all associated responses. Only admins can delete feedback forms.

variable.description: Base URL for the API (update for production)
UUID of first question (get from create feedback response)
